acronyms.usage: Refers to the interface between a computer system and external devices
Allows external devices to directly access system memory
A signal sent by an external device to request attention from the CPU

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a bridge connecting the CPU to external devices
Picture a temporary storage area for data during transfer
Envision a faster, more accessible location for frequently accessed data

analogies.analogy: A messenger between the CPU and external devices
A holding area for data during transfer, like a waiting room
A shortcut to frequently accessed data, like a bookmark
